name: rust-cli
label: Rust CLI Tool
description: A fast command-line tool written in Rust with clap and tests.
body:
# PRD: Rust CLI Tool

## Overview
Build a fast, ergonomic CLI in Rust.

## Requirements
- Argument parsing with clap
- Subcommands with help text
- Unit + integration tests
- Release build profile

## Success Criteria
- cargo test passes
- cargo build --release produces a single binary
